expectations.text: Proactively raises an onion/layering concern despite only being asked 'anything to flag?'
expectations.evidence: Finding 2: 'Application layer talks to the DB directly (onion layering) ... infrastructure/persistence work leaking into the application layer.'

expectations.text: Flags service querying container.db directly; should use a repository
expectations.evidence: Finding 2: 'It should call a UsageRepository (injected via the container) that owns the query.'

expectations.text: Flags new OpenAIProvider instead of container.llm
expectations.evidence: Finding 3: 'Service news a concrete adapter instead of depending on an abstraction ... Resolve the provider off this.container.'
Finding 1: 'LocalSecretsProvider is the only place allowed to touch process.env.'
'I'd route the query through a repository, take both the LLM provider and the API key from the container.'
